decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today with the S&P 500 unchanged and NASDAQ down just 0.1%, a quiet consolidation session with no major directional catalyst. Our cash balance sits at $477 — just below the $500 threshold to trigger new position opening — so we're holding our 6 current positions while keeping 4 slots ready. The portfolio remains in excellent shape at +31.6% overall; no exits warranted without evidence of deterioration.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted sideways on June 17, with the S&P 500 closing flat and the NASDAQ off just 0.1%, reflecting a low-conviction consolidation session typical of mid-June when institutional investors rebalance ahead of quarter-end. No major economic releases or Federal Reserve commentary provided a directional spark, leaving volume thin and price action narrow. Beneath the surface, momentum continued in select biotech and small-cap names while large-cap tech paused.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股6月17日橫盤整理，標普500幾近平收，納指微跌0.1%，市場進入季末前的低波動調整期。由於缺乏重大經濟數據或聯儲局官員講話等催化劑，成交量偏低，整體走勢欠缺方向。盤面上，生技及部分小型股的動能仍在延續，大型科技股則暫時按兵不動，靜待新的觸發點。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag is the performance penalty from holding uninvested cash — it earns near zero while the market moves. Today is a textbook example: we have $477 sitting idle with 4 open portfolio slots, slightly missing the $500 trigger. In a rising market, this idle cash would slowly erode our edge over VOO. The fix isn't reckless buying, but rather sizing existing positions efficiently so cash doesn't linger long between opportunities.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」是指持有閒置現金而帶來的績效損失——現金幾乎不產生回報，而市場卻持續波動。今天正是典型案例：組合中有477美元現金閒置，距500美元的建倉門檻僅一步之遙，4個倉位空著。若市場持續上漲，這部分閒置現金將逐漸拖低我們相對VOO的超額回報。解決之道不是盲目買入，而是在機會出現時有效部署資金，避免現金長期沉睡。
